title: Performance Marketing Consultant (m/w/d)

required_skills.original: Begeisterung für Online-Marketing und datengetriebenes Arbeiten
required_skills.evidence: Campaign performance optimisation, E-commerce & campaign ROI analytics, data storytelling in CV

required_skills.original: Erste praktische Erfahrung im Bereich Performance Marketing oder SEA
required_skills.evidence: Campaign Analytics & ROI Measurement at IPC; Multi-market Campaign Performance at GRG Banking; E-commerce Funnel & Audience Analytics at Moli Media — note: candidate is overqualified for entry-level requirement
A/B testing & experiment design, Funnel & conversion analysis, Cross-functional team coordination listed in skills
Candidate has German B1+ — JD requires 'sehr gute' (B2/C1 level); this is a gap

core_responsibilities.responsibility: Planning and managing digital campaigns (SEA, Google Ads, Amazon Ads)
core_responsibilities.original: Verantwortung für die Planung und Steuerung digitaler Kampagnen (SEA, Google Ads, Amazon Ads)
core_responsibilities.evidence: Campaign Analytics & ROI Measurement, Multi-market Campaign Performance — note: specific SEA/Google Ads/Amazon Ads platform tools not explicitly listed
Funnel Optimisation & Lead Analytics, E-commerce & campaign ROI analytics, Marketing KPI framework design
Campaign performance optimisation, A/B testing & experiment design

core_responsibilities.responsibility: Collaboration with clients on strategy development
core_responsibilities.original: Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Kund*innen bei der Entwicklung individueller Strategien
core_responsibilities.evidence: Cross-functional team coordination, Go-to-market strategy support, C-level data storytelling

core_responsibilities.responsibility: Marketing process automation and efficiency improvement
core_responsibilities.original: Unterstützung bei der Automatisierung und Effizienzsteigerung unserer Marketingprozesse
core_responsibilities.evidence: No explicit marketing automation tools (e.g. Google Ads scripts, Amazon Advertising API) mentioned in CV

scoring.recommendation: 优先处理，正常生成材料

gaps.note: B1+ is below the 'sehr gute' threshold. Candidate should highlight German usage in professional contexts and any ongoing improvement.

gaps.item: Marketing process automation (Google Ads scripts, Amazon Advertising API)
gaps.note: No explicit automation tooling mentioned. Candidate could reference project management and efficiency tools (Scrum/SAFe) as adjacent experience.

highlights: Multi-role campaign analytics background (B2B and e-commerce) maps directly to core responsibilities
E-commerce & campaign ROI analytics aligns with Amaseo's Amazon/Google platform focus
Candidate is overqualified for entry-level requirement — strong asset for role impact, but may raise seniority/salary fit questions
Power BI and Looker Studio skills strengthen data reporting credibility
Small startup context suits candidate's cross-functional and self-directed work style
cv_tailoring_hints: Emphasize Amazon and Google campaign experience explicitly (e.g., ROI analytics for e-commerce clients)
Highlight any exposure to SEA or paid search workflows, even indirectly
Mention German language use in professional settings to partially mitigate the B1+ gap
Frame startup/agile experience (Scrum, SAFe) as alignment with Start-up-Spirit culture
Keep CV concise and entry-level-friendly in tone — avoid over-emphasizing seniority to prevent self-pricing out
missing_skills: Marketing process automation (Google Ads scripts, Amazon Advertising API)
recommended_emphasis: Emphasize Amazon and Google campaign experience explicitly (e.g., ROI analytics for e-commerce clients)
Highlight any exposure to SEA or paid search workflows, even indirectly
Mention German language use in professional settings to partially mitigate the B1+ gap
